mapper.select: SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LL.LEARN_LIST_ID, LL.CLASS_ID, LL.TEACHER_ID, LC.TITLE, LC.LEARN_TYPE AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > LC.END_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < LC.START_DATE THEN '대기중' ELSE '운영중' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(LC.TARGET_TIME, 0) AS DURATION, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, LC.CONTENT, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, '전체 (' || ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) || '명)' AS TARGET, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LP.STUDENT_ID) FROM LEARN_FBD LF JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LF.PROGRESS_ID = LP.PROGRESS_ID WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND NVL(LF.DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1 ) AS DIFFICULT_COUNT, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(LC.DELETED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) AS COMPLETED_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS IS NOT NULL AND LP.STATUS != 'COMPLETED' ) AS IN_PROGRESS_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) - ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID ) AS NOT_STARTED_COUNT, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR( ( SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0)), 0) FROM LEARN_PRO LP JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = LP.STUDENT_ID WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) ) END AS COMPLETION_RATE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) AS TOTAL_STUDENT_COUNT FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = #{trashYn} ORDER BY LC.CREATED_AT DESC, LC.LEARN_ID DESC

SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS ID, LL.LEARN_LIST_ID, LL.CLASS_ID, LL.TEACHER_ID, LC.TITLE, LC.LEARN_TYPE AS TYPE, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.REQUIRED_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS REQUIRED, CASE WHEN LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > LC.END_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < LC.START_DATE THEN '대기중' ELSE '운영중' END AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DEADLINE, NVL(LC.TARGET_TIME, 0) AS DURATION, LC.ATTACH_URL AS LINK_URL, LC.CONTENT, LC.GUIDE_POINT AS TEXT_CONTENT, '전체 (' || ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) || '명)' AS TARGET, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LP.STUDENT_ID) FROM LEARN_FBD LF JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LF.PROGRESS_ID = LP.PROGRESS_ID WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND NVL(LF.DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1 ) AS DIFFICULT_COUNT, CASE WHEN NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS DELETED, TO_CHAR(LC.DELETED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DELETED_AT, 0 AS COMPLETED_COUNT, 0 AS IN_PROGRESS_COUNT, 0 AS NOT_STARTED_COUNT, 0 AS COMPLETION_RATE, 0 AS TOTAL_STUDENT_COUNT FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND LC.LEARN_ID = #{learnId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LEARN_LIST ( LEARN_LIST_ID, CLASS_ID, TEACHER_ID, TITLE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{learnListId}, #{classId}, #{teacherId}, #{dto.title}, TO_DATE(#{dto.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{dto.deadline}, 'T', ' '), 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO LEARN_CONT ( LEARN_ID, LEARN_LIST_ID, TITLE, LEARN_TYPE, CONTENT, REQUIRED_YN, START_DATE, END_DATE, TARGET_TIME, GUIDE_POINT, ATTACH_URL, DELETE_YN, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{learnId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{learnListId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.content, jdbcType=CLOB}, CASE WHEN #{dto.required, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, TO_DATE(#{dto.startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{dto.deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{dto.duration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.textContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, NULL, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARN_CONT SET TITLE = #{dto.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEARN_TYPE = #{dto.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTENT = #{dto.content, jdbcType=CLOB}, REQUIRED_YN = CASE WHEN #{dto.required, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, START_DATE = TO_DATE(#{dto.startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), END_DATE = TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{dto.deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TARGET_TIME = #{dto.duration, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, GUIDE_POINT = #{dto.textContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATTACH_URL = #{dto.linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE LEARN_ID = #{learnId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND LEARN_LIST_ID IN ( SELECT LEARN_LIST_ID FROM LEARN_LIST WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT LF.LEARN_FBD_ID, LF.PROGRESS_ID, LP.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, S.PROFILE_IMAGE, LF.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(LF.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, TO_CHAR(LF.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATED_AT, LP.STATUS, NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS PROGRESS_RATE FROM LEARN_FBD LF JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LF.PROGRESS_ID = LP.PROGRESS_ID JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID JOIN STUDENT S ON LP.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} AND LP.LEARN_ID = #{learnId} AND NVL(LF.DIFFICULT_YN, 0) = 1 ORDER BY LF.UPDATED_AT DESC, LF.LEARN_FBD_ID DESC

SELECT SC.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, S.PROFILE_IMAGE, CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN '완료' WHEN LP.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN '진행중' ELSE '미시작' END AS STATUS, NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS PROGRESS_RATE, TO_CHAR(NVL(LP.LAST_SAVED_AT, LP.START_DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LAST_ACCESSED_AT, NVL(LP.TOTAL_MINUTE, 0) AS TOTAL_MINUTE FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN STUDENT S ON SC.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LP.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID AND LP.LEARN_ID = #{learnId} JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_ID = #{learnId} JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL AND LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND LL.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 WHEN LP.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, NVL(LP.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) DESC, S.STUDENT_NAME ASC
